description_long: This is a full-size mechanical keyboard featuring a standard key layout with a numeric keypad on the right. The keyboard has a black chassis with RGB backlighting illuminating the keycaps in a spectrum of colors, including red, blue, green, and purple. The keycaps are slightly raised, allowing the backlight to shine through and around each key, creating a vibrant and visually striking effect. The frame appears to be made of hard plastic with a matte finish, and the keys are likely made of ABS or PBT plastic. The keyboard sits flat with a low profile and has a red accent line running along the bottom edge. No visible cable or wireless receiver is attached, and there are no visible brand logos on the surface.
description: A full-size RGB-backlit mechanical keyboard with a black chassis, colorful illuminated keycaps, and a red accent line along the bottom edge.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the keyboard, the RGB-lit keycaps, and the red accent line at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the keyboard's slim profile, raised keycaps, and the layered effect of the chassis.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back row of keys, the RGB lighting, and the overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the slim profile and the arrangement of the keys from the other end.
